Time-series decomposition plot

Source: R/timeseries.R
decompose_plot.Rd

Decomposes a seasonal time series into trend, seasonal and remainder components and shows them, with the original series, as stacked panels.

Usage

decompose_plot(
  x,
  frequency = NULL,
  method = c("stl", "classical"),
  title = NULL
)

Arguments

x

A ts object, or a numeric vector (then frequency is required).

frequency

Number of observations per period (e.g. 12 for monthly data); taken from x when it is a ts.

method

"stl" (loess-based) or "classical" (stats::decompose()).

title

Plot title.

Value

A 'patchwork' object (printable like a ggplot2::ggplot).

Examples

decompose_plot(AirPassengers)

decompose_plot(AirPassengers, method = "classical")
